title: Using AI to outsmart drug-resistant bacteria
summary: Researchers at the University of Cambridge led by Ben Luisi use AI tools including AlphaFold, Gemini, and Co-Scientist to accelerate the discovery of bacterial defense mechanisms against antibiotics. The approach compresses analysis timelines from years to minutes, enabling faster responses to antimicrobial resistance, a significant global health challenge.
